sentences.text: Mă numesc Hastings.
sentences.original: My name is Hastings.

sentences.text: Locuiesc cu prietenul meu Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Я живу с моим другом Пуаро.
sentences.original: I live with my friend Poirot.

sentences.text: El este un detectiv foarte deștept.
sentences.original: He is a very clever detective.

sentences.text: Într-o seară am fost la o cină.
sentences.translationRu: Однажды вечером я был на ужине.
sentences.original: One evening I went to a dinner.

sentences.text: Acolo era o doamnă Robinson.
sentences.original: There was a Mrs. Robinson there.

sentences.text: Ea a vorbit despre noul ei apartament.
sentences.translationRu: Она рассказала о своей новой квартире.
sentences.original: She talked about her new flat.

sentences.text: Apartamentul este foarte frumos.
sentences.original: The flat is very nice.

sentences.text: Este într-un cartier scump.
sentences.original: It is in an expensive area.

sentences.text: Dar doamna Robinson plătește foarte puțin.
sentences.translationRu: Но миссис Робинсон платит совсем мало.
sentences.original: But Mrs. Robinson pays very little.

sentences.text: Acasă, i-am spus lui Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Дома я рассказал об этом Пуаро.
sentences.original: At home, I told Poirot.

sentences.text: Un apartament bun și foarte ieftin, am zis.
sentences.translationRu: Хорошая квартира и очень дешёвая, сказал я.
sentences.original: A good flat and very cheap, I said.

sentences.text: Asta este ciudat, a spus el.
sentences.original: That is strange, he said.

sentences.text: Un apartament ca acesta costă mult.
sentences.original: A flat like this costs a lot.

sentences.text: Vreau să văd apartamentul.
sentences.original: I want to see the flat.

sentences.text: A doua zi am mers acolo.
sentences.translationRu: На следующий день мы пошли туда.
sentences.original: The next day we went there.

sentences.text: Poirot a vorbit cu portarul.
sentences.original: Poirot spoke with the porter.

sentences.text: Mulți oameni au vrut apartamentul, a spus portarul.
sentences.translationRu: Многие хотели снять эту квартиру, сказал швейцар.
sentences.original: Many people wanted the flat, said the porter.

sentences.text: Dar doamna Robinson l-a primit ieftin.
sentences.translationRu: Но получила её дёшево миссис Робинсон.
sentences.original: But Mrs. Robinson got it cheaply.

sentences.text: Aici se ascunde un secret, a spus Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Здесь скрыта какая-то тайна, сказал Пуаро.
sentences.original: A secret is hidden here, said Poirot.

sentences.text: Cineva voia o doamnă Robinson aici.
sentences.translationRu: Кто-то хотел, чтобы здесь жила миссис Робинсон.
sentences.original: Someone wanted a Mrs. Robinson here.

sentences.text: Nu înțeleg, am spus eu.
sentences.original: I do not understand, I said.

sentences.text: Vei înțelege curând, a răspuns Poirot.
sentences.original: You will understand soon, answered Poirot.

sentences.text: Apoi a venit inspectorul Japp.
sentences.original: Then Inspector Japp came.

sentences.text: El lucrează la poliție.
sentences.original: He works at the police.

sentences.text: Niște planuri secrete au dispărut, a spus Japp.
sentences.original: Some secret plans have disappeared, said Japp.

sentences.text: Sunt planurile unui submarin.
sentences.original: They are the plans of a submarine.

sentences.text: Un italian le-a furat în America.
sentences.translationRu: Их украл в Америке один итальянец.
sentences.original: An Italian stole them in America.

sentences.text: Se numea Luigi Valdarno, dar acum este mort.
sentences.translationRu: Его звали Луиджи Вальдарно, но теперь он мёртв.
sentences.original: His name was Luigi Valdarno, but now he is dead.

sentences.text: A dat planurile unei femei.
sentences.original: He gave the plans to a woman.

sentences.text: Femeia este o spioană, Elsa Hardt.
sentences.original: The woman is a spy, Elsa Hardt.

sentences.text: Elsa Hardt a fugit în Anglia, a spus Japp.
sentences.translationRu: Эльза Хардт сбежала в Англию, сказал Джепп.
sentences.original: Elsa Hardt has fled to England, said Japp.

sentences.text: Are părul roșu și ochii albaștri.
sentences.translationRu: У неё рыжие волосы и голубые глаза.
sentences.original: She has red hair and blue eyes.

sentences.text: Aceeași descriere ca doamna Robinson! a spus Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Такое же описание, как у миссис Робинсон! сказал Пуаро.
sentences.original: The same description as Mrs. Robinson! said Poirot.

sentences.text: Acum totul este clar.
sentences.original: Now everything is clear.

sentences.text: Apartamentul ieftin este o capcană, a spus Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Дешёвая квартира — это ловушка, сказал Пуаро.
sentences.original: The cheap flat is a trap, said Poirot.

sentences.text: Spionii au închiriat apartamentul.
sentences.original: The spies rented the flat.

sentences.text: Apoi au plecat și l-au oferit ieftin.
sentences.translationRu: Потом они уехали и предложили её дёшево.
sentences.original: Then they left and offered it cheaply.

sentences.text: Ei voiau o doamnă Robinson aici.
sentences.translationRu: Им была нужна некая миссис Робинсон.
sentences.original: They wanted a Mrs. Robinson here.

sentences.text: Robinson este un nume foarte comun.
sentences.original: Robinson is a very common name.

sentences.text: Niște oameni răi o caută pe Elsa Hardt.
sentences.original: Some bad men are looking for Elsa Hardt.

sentences.text: Ei vor veni la acest apartament.
sentences.original: They will come to this flat.

sentences.text: Și vor ataca doamna greșită.
sentences.translationRu: И нападут не на ту даму.
sentences.original: And they will attack the wrong lady.

sentences.text: Trebuie să-i salvăm pe Robinson, am spus eu.
sentences.translationRu: Мы должны спасти Робинсонов, сказал я.
sentences.original: We must save the Robinsons, I said.

sentences.text: Poirot are un plan.
sentences.original: Poirot has a plan.

sentences.text: El a închiriat apartamentul de deasupra.
sentences.original: He rented the flat above.

sentences.text: Acolo vom aștepta, a spus el.
sentences.translationRu: Там мы и будем ждать, сказал он.
sentences.original: There we will wait, he said.

sentences.text: Duminică seara familia Robinson a plecat.
sentences.original: On Sunday evening the Robinsons left.

sentences.text: Apartamentul lor era acum gol.
sentences.original: Their flat was now empty.

sentences.text: Am coborât cu liftul pentru cărbuni.
sentences.original: We went down in the coal lift.

sentences.text: Așa am intrat în apartamentul gol.
sentences.translationRu: Так мы пробрались в пустую квартиру.
sentences.original: So we got into the empty flat.

sentences.text: Am stins lumina și am așteptat.
sentences.translationRu: Мы погасили свет и стали ждать.
sentences.original: We turned off the light and waited.

sentences.text: Totul era foarte liniștit.
sentences.original: Everything was very quiet.

sentences.text: Inima mea bătea repede.
sentences.original: My heart was beating fast.

sentences.text: Deodată am auzit un zgomot la ușă.
sentences.translationRu: Вдруг мы услышали шорох у двери.
sentences.original: Suddenly we heard a noise at the door.

sentences.text: Un bărbat a deschis ușa încet.
sentences.original: A man opened the door slowly.

sentences.text: Ținea un cuțit în mână.
sentences.original: He held a knife in his hand.

sentences.text: Este un italian, a șoptit Poirot.
sentences.original: He is an Italian, whispered Poirot.

sentences.text: Acum, Hastings! a spus Poirot.
sentences.original: Now, Hastings! said Poirot.

sentences.text: Am sărit pe bărbat din spate.
sentences.original: I jumped on the man from behind.

sentences.text: Poirot i-a luat cuțitul.
sentences.original: Poirot took his knife.

sentences.text: Bărbatul nu a mai putut lupta.
sentences.original: The man could not fight anymore.

sentences.text: Du-ne la Elsa Hardt, a spus Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Отведи нас к Эльзе Хардт, сказал Пуаро.
sentences.original: Take us to Elsa Hardt, said Poirot.

sentences.text: Bărbatul s-a speriat și a fost de acord.
sentences.original: The man was afraid and agreed.

sentences.text: Ne-a dus la o altă casă.
sentences.translationRu: Он отвёл нас к другому дому.
sentences.original: He took us to another house.

sentences.text: Acolo locuia adevărata Elsa Hardt.
sentences.original: There lived the real Elsa Hardt.

sentences.text: Elsa Hardt ne-a văzut și a înțeles totul.
sentences.translationRu: Эльза Хардт увидела нас и всё поняла.
sentences.original: Elsa Hardt saw us and understood everything.

sentences.text: Lângă telefon era un pisoi negru de catifea.
sentences.translationRu: Рядом с телефоном стоял чёрный бархатный кот.
sentences.original: Next to the telephone was a black velvet cat.

sentences.text: Femeia l-a luat repede.
sentences.original: The woman quickly took it.

sentences.text: Planurile sunt aici, în pisoi, a spus ea.
sentences.translationRu: Чертежи здесь, в коте, сказала она.
sentences.original: The plans are here, in the cat, she said.

sentences.text: Sunt cusute în interior.
sentences.original: They are sewn inside.

sentences.text: Apoi a vrut să fugă.
sentences.original: Then she tried to run.

sentences.text: Italianul a scos un pistol și a tras.
sentences.original: The Italian took out a gun and fired.

sentences.text: Dar pistolul era gol.
sentences.original: But the gun was empty.

sentences.text: Poirot scosese gloanțele înainte.
sentences.original: Poirot had taken out the bullets before.

sentences.text: În acel moment a intrat Japp.
sentences.original: At that moment Japp came in.

sentences.text: A venit cu un american pe nume Burt.
sentences.translationRu: Он пришёл с американцем по имени Бёрт.
sentences.original: He came with an American called Burt.

sentences.text: Burt lucrează pentru serviciul secret.
sentences.original: Burt works for the secret service.

sentences.text: Poliția i-a arestat pe spioni.
sentences.original: The police arrested the spies.

sentences.text: Burt a luat pisoiul negru.
sentences.original: Burt took the black cat.

sentences.text: A găsit planurile în interior.
sentences.original: He found the plans inside.

sentences.text: Planurile sunt salvate, mulțumesc! a spus el.
sentences.original: The plans are safe, thank you! he said.

sentences.text: Iar familia Robinson este în siguranță.
sentences.original: And the Robinsons are safe.

sentences.text: Ești minunat, Poirot, am spus eu.
sentences.original: You are wonderful, Poirot, I said.

sentences.text: Cum ai înțeles totul?
sentences.original: How did you understand everything?

sentences.text: Foarte simplu, prietene, a răspuns el.
sentences.translationRu: Очень просто, друг мой, ответил он.
sentences.original: Very simple, my friend, he answered.

sentences.text: Un apartament prea ieftin ascunde mereu ceva.
sentences.translationRu: Слишком дешёвая квартира всегда что-то скрывает.
sentences.original: A flat that is too cheap always hides something.
